title: The One Where Everyone Finds Out

lines.text: Monica and Rachel's, everyone is eating some Chinese food.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (looking out the window) Oh hey, you guys, look! Ugly Naked Guy is putting stuff in boxes!
They all run and join her at the window.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'd say from the looks of it; our naked buddy is moving.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ironically, most of the boxes seem to be labeled clothes.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, I'm gonna miss that big old squishy butt.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And we're done with the chicken fried rice.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! Hey! If he's moving, maybe I should try to get his place!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Good idea! Yes!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It would be so cool to live across from you guys!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, yeah! Then we could do that telephone thing! Y'know, you have a can, we have a can and it's connected by a string!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Or we can do the actual telephone thing.
Opening Credits
Ugly Naked Guy's apartment, Ross, Rachel, and Phoebe are checking out the place. Luckily, Ugly Naked Guy is nowhere to be seen.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God! I love this apartment! Isn't it perfect?! I can't believe I never realized how great it is!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well that is because your eye immediately goes to the big naked man.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's amazing! You better hurry up and fill out an application or I'm gonna beat you to it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (laughing) Ohh. (Phoebe takes a couple of steps to the door and Ross quickly hurries out.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I never thought I'd say this, but I'm gonna go use Ugly Naked Guy's bathroom. (Does so.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (looking out the window) Oh, look! There's Monica and Chandler! (Starts yelling.) Hey! Hey, you guys! Hey! (Chandler and Monica start taking each other's clothes off.) Ohh!! Ohh! Ahh-ahhh!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (screaming) Ahhh!! Chandler and Monica!! Chandler and Monica!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: CHANDLER AND MONICA!!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: OH MY GOD!!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: OH!! MY EYES!!! MY EYES!!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe!! Phoebe!! It's okay!! It's okay!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: NO! THEY'RE DOING IT!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I KNOW!! I KNOW!! I KNOW!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: YOU KNOW?!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, I know! And Joey knows! But Ross doesn't know so you have to stop screaming!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) What's going on?

lines.speaker: Phoebe and Rachel
lines.text: Ohhh!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (trying to divert his attention from the window by jumping up and down) HI!! Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Nothing! Oh God, we're just so excited that you want to get this apartment!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Actually, it looks really good. (Turns towards the window and now Phoebe starts jumping to divert his attention.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Screaming incoherently.) Get in here!!! (Motions to join her and Rachel.)
Ross starts jumping and screaming incoherently and hops over and joins in on the group hug.
Central Perk, Phoebe and Rachel are there talking about Chandler and Monica.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You mean whenever Monica and Chandler where like y'know doing laundry or going grocery shopping or-Oh! All that time Monica spent on the phone with sad Linda from camp!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh, doing it. Doing it. Phone doing it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! Oh, I can't believe it! I mean I think it's great! For him. She might be able to do better.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey guys!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey! Come here! Come here!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What? What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe just found out about Monica and Chandler.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You mean how they're friends and nothing more? (Glares at Rachel.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No. Joey, she knows! We were at Ugly Naked Guy's apartment and we saw them doing it through the window. (Joey gasps) Actually, we saw them doing it up against the window.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, so now they know that you know and they don't know that Rachel knows?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes, but y'know what? It doesn't matter who knows what. Now, enough of us know that we can just tell them that we know! Then all the lying and the secrets would finally be over!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Or, we could not tell them we know and have a little fun of our own.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wh-what do you mean?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well y'know every time that they say that like they're doing laundry we'll just give them a bunch of laundry to do.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohhh, I-I would enjoy that!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No-no-no! No-no wait Rach, you know what would even be more fun? Telling them.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ehhh, no, I wanna do Phoebe's thing.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can't take any...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! You don't have to do anything! Just don't tell them that we know!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Noo! I can't take any more secrets! (To Rachel) I've got your secrets. I've got their secrets. I got secrets of my own y'know!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You don't have any secrets!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah? Well, you don't know about Hugsy, my bedtime penguin pal. (Joey shies away.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Phoebe) So umm, how-how are we gonna mess with them?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ugh.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, you could use your position y'know as the roommate.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And then. I would use y'know the strongest tool at my disposal. My sexuality.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Hello children!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, watch, learn, and don't eat my cookie.
She gets up and goes over to Chandler who's ordering some coffee from Gunther.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey! Ooh, wow that jacket looks great on you!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (feels his arm) Yeah the material feels so soft-hello Mr. Bicep! Have you been working out?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I try to y'know, squeeze things. (Phoebe giggles uncontrollably.) Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, if you really wanna know, I'm-Oh! I can't tell you this.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Phoebe, it's me. You can tell me anything.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well actually you're the one person I can't tell this too. And the one person I want to the most.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I think it's just y'know that I haven't been with a guy in so long and how sometimes you're looking for something and you just don't even see that it's right there in front of you sipping coffee-Oh no, have I said to much? Well it's just something to think about. I know I will.
She makes a show of bending over to get her coat and showing off her bum. She then walks out, leaving no one to eat her cookie.
Chandler's bedroom, Chandler and Monica are there, of course. Like who else would it be, duh!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You are so cute! How did you get to be so cute?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, my Grandfather was Swedish and my Grandmother was actually a tiny little bunny.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, now you're even cuter!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know that is a popular opinion today I must say.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The weirdest thing happened at the coffee house, I think, I think Phoebe was hitting on me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm telling you I think Phoebe thinks I'm foxy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's not possible!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm sorry it's just, Phoebe just always thought you were, you were charming in a, in a sexless kind of way.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, y'know I-I can't hear that enough.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm sorry, I think that you just misunderstood her.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, I didn't misunderstand, okay? She was all over me! She touched my bicep for crying out loud!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This bicep?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well it's not flexed right now!
Monica and Rachel's, Monica, Rachel, Phoebe, and Chandler are there. Monica is entering from her room.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey Mon, what are you doing now? Wanna come see a movie with us?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uhh, y'know actually I was gonna do some laundry.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Chandler, wanna do it with me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sure, I'll do it with ya.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay great, hold on a sec! (She runs to her room and returns carrying a huge bag of laundry.) Oh, here you go! You don't mind do ya? That would really help me out a lot! Thanks!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I mean I-I don't I think I have enough quarters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I have quarters! (She holds up a bag of quarters.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey Ross! Any word on the apartment yet?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I called over there and it turns out Ugly Naked Guy is subletting it himself and he's already had like a hundred applicants.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No-no, I got the edge. I know it's not exactly ethical but I sent him a little bribe to
tip the scales in my direction. Check it out, you can probably see it from the window. (They all head to the window.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, is it that pinball machine with the big bow on it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That new mountain bike?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well what did you send?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: A basket of mini-muffins.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: But there's a whole table of mini-muffin baskets. Which one did you send?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The small one.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?! You-you actually thought that basket was gonna get you the apartment?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well yeah! Someone sent us a basket at work once and people went crazy over those little muffins. It was the best day.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Your work makes me sad.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh man! I want that place so much!! I was so sure that was gonna work! There's twelve bucks I'll never see again! (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right honey, we'd better go if we wanna catch that movie.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Bye Chandler! (She walks up to him.) (Quietly.) I miss you already. (She pinches his butt.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (after they've left) Okay, did you see that?! With the inappropriate and the pinching!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Actually, I did!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, so now do you believe that she's attracted to me?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohhh, oh my God! Oh my God! She knows about us!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe knows and she's just trying to freak us out! That's the only explanation for it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (a little hurt) Okay but what about y'know my pinchable butt and my bulging biceps-She knows!
Commercial Break
Chandler, Joey, and Ross's, Joey is snoozing with Hugsy, his bedtime penguin pal and Chandler and Monica come storming in.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Joey!
Joey quickly tries to hide Hugsy by throwing it over his head.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Phoebe knows about us!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well I didn't tell them!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Them?! Who's them?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhhh, Phoebe and Joey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And Rachel. I would've told you but they made me promise not to tell!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh man!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm sorry! But hey, it's over now, right? Because you can tell them that you know they know and I can go back to knowing absolutely nothing!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Unless...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! Not unless! Look this must end now!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh man, they think they are so slick messing with us! But see they don't know that we know that they know! So...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ahh yes, the messers become the messies!
Monica and Rachel's, Ross is looking at Ugly Naked Guy's apartment through binoculars.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Noooo.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Ross, honey you gotta stop torturing yourself!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, why don't you just find another apartment?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look I've already looked at like a thousand apartments this month and none of them even compares to that one!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know what you should do?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You should find out what his hobbies are and then use that to bond with him. Yeah! Like if I would strike up a conversation about say umm, sandwiches. Or uh, or my underwear.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm listening.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Ross) See?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That is a great idea! And! I know Ugly Naked Guy because we've been watching him for like five years so that gives me back my edge! Oh, let's see now he had the trampoline.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: He broke that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, he had gravity boots.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, he broke those too.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So he likes to break stuff.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I've got to go pick up Ben but I-I will figure something out. (He opens the door and stops.) Hey, didn't he used to have a cat?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I wouldn't bring that up, it would probably just bum him out.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, poor cat, never saw that big butt coming.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Right. (Exits.)
The phone rings and Rachel answers it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hello! (Listens) Oh yeah! Hey! Hold on a second she's right here! (To Phoebe) It's Chandler.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (in a sexy voice) Oh? (Takes the phone from Rachel.) Hello you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hello Phoebe, I've been thinking about you all day. (He's holding the phone so that Monica can hear it as well.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Eh?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well you know that thing you said before, I'd be lying if I said I wasn't intrigued.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, listen, Joey isn't gonna be here tonight so why don't you come over and I'll let you uh, feel my bicep. Or maybe more.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'll have to get back to you on that. Okay, bye! (Hangs up.) Oh my God! He wants me to come over and feel his bicep and more!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Are you kidding?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I can not believe he would do that to Mon-Whoa! (She stops suddenly and slowly turns to point at Joey. Joey is avoiding her eyes.) Joey, do they know that we know?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: They know you know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ugh, I knew it! Oh I cannot believe those two!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: God, they thought they can mess with us! They're trying to mess with us?! They don't know that we know they know we know! (Joey just shakes his head.) Joey, you can't say anything!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I couldn't even if I wanted too.
Outside Ugly Naked Guy's apartment, Ross is knocks on the door and Ugly Naked Guy answers it. He's ugly. He's naked. And he's holding a huge jumbo soda.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good evening, sir. My name is Ross Geller. I'm one of the people who applied for the apartment. And I-I realize that the competition is fierce but-I'm sorry. I, I can't help but notice you're naked and (He claps his hands.) I applaud you. Man, I wish I was naked. I mean, this-this looks so great. That is how God intended it.
[Scene: Monica and Rachel's, Chandler and Monica and Rachel and Phoebe are planning their respective strategies to break the other pairing. Joey is not amused.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (in the kitchen with Chandler) Look at them, they're-they're panicked!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah, they're totally gonna back down!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh yeah!
[Cut to Phoebe and Rachel sitting on the couch.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right. All right! If he wants a date? He's gonna get a date. All right, I'm gonna go in.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right. Be sexy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (laughs) Please.
She saunters over to Chandler with a mean pair of 'Come hither' eyes and she glares at Monica.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So Chandler, I-I'd love to come by tonight.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (initially worried, but gets over it) Really?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh absolutely. Shall we say, around seven?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Good. I'm really looking forward to you and me having sexual intercourse.
As she walks away, Chandler mouths a scream to Monica. How motions and mouths, "It's okay, it's okay."

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (looking out the window) Hey-hey, check it out! Check it out! Ugly Naked Guy has a naked friend!
They all run over to the window.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah! (She gasps.) Oh my God! That is our friend! (Monica covers her face.) It's Naked Ross! (Monica turns and buries her face in Chandler's shoulder.)

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Yeah, it is! Naked Ross!!
Monica and Rachel's, Rachel is getting Phoebe ready for her date.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Show time!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, Rachel, get me perfume!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay! (She runs to get some.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And Joey, get me a bottle of wine and glasses? (He begrudgingly does so.)
In the meantime, Rachel has returned with the perfume and sprays a mist out in front of Phoebe who walks through the mist and does a little spin.
[Cut to Chandler, Joey, and Ross's, Monica is getting Chandler ready for his half of the plan.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, it'll be great! You just make her think you wanna have sex with her! It'll totally freak her out!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, listen, how far am I gonna have to go with her?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Relax, she-she's gonna give in way before you do!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How do you know?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Because you're on my team! And my team always wins!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: At this?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Just go get some! (Kisses him.) Go! (She runs to hide in the bathroom.)
[Cut to the hallway, Phoebe is outside getting some last minute instructions from Rachel.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (handing her the wine) Okay honey, now I'm gonna try to listen from right here!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay? Whoa, wait! (She undoes one button on Phoebe's dress.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Good idea!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, oh wait! (She goes for another one.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh now, don't give away the farm!
Phoebe knocks on the door with the wine and Chandler answers it. Rachel hides next to the door.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Come on in.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I was going too. (They go inside and he closes the door.) Umm, I brought some wine. Would you like some?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sure.
She makes a big show out of pulling out the cork and pours the wine.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So, here we are. Nervous?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Me? No. You?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, I want this to happen.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So do I.
They click their glasses and take a sip. That sip turns into a gulp, which quickly progresses into their mutual draining of their glasses at once.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm gonna put on some music.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Maybe, maybe I'll dance for you. (She starts doing a rather suggestive and seductive dance that's silly at the same time.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You look good.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thanks! Y'know, that when you say things like that it makes me wanna rip that sweater vest right off!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, why don't we move this into the bedroom?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, do you not want to?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No. No! It's just y'know first, I wanna take off all my clothes and have you rub lotion on me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (swallowing hard) Well that would be nice. I'll go get the lotion.
[Cut to the bathroom, Chandler is entering.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Listen, this is totally getting out of hand! Okay? She wants me to put lotion on her!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's bluffing!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, she's not backing down! She went like this! (He does a little mimic of her dance.)
[Cut to the hallway where Phoebe is conferring with Rachel.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: He's not backing down. He went to get lotion.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering the hall) Oh man! Aren't you guys done yet?! I wanna sit in my chair!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey look, just look at it this way, the sooner Phoebe breaks Chandler the sooner this is all over and out in the open.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I like that! (To Phoebe) Oh, okay! Show him your bra! He's afraid of bras! Can't work 'em! (He swiftly rips open the front of Phoebe's dress revealing her bra.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey! (Examining the dress.) Wow, you didn't rip off any buttons.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's not my first time.
[Cut to the bathroom.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You go back out there and you seduce her till she cracks!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, give me a second! (Pause) Did you clean up in here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Of course.
[Cut back to the living room. Chandler slowly exits the bathroom and gets pushed from behind by Monica and sees Phoebe closing the apartment door.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, you're-you're going?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Umm, not without you, lover. (She slowly walks over to him and is showcasing her bra.) So, this is my bra.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (swallowing hard) It's very, very nice. Well, come here. I'm very were gonna be having all the sex.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You should be. I'm very bendy. (Pause) I'm gonna kiss you now.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Not if I kiss you first.

They move closer to together and Phoebe hesitantly puts her hand on Chandler's hip. He puts his hand on her left hip but then decides to put his hand on her left hip. Phoebe then grabs his butt. Chandler goes for her breast, but stops and puts his hand on her shoulder.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I guess there's nothing left for us to do but-but kiss.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Here it comes. Our first kiss.

They slowly and hesitantly move their lips together and kiss gently. Phoebe has her eyes wide open in shock and Chandler is squinting. He finally breaks the kiss after only a short while and pushes Phoebe away.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay! Okay! Okay! You win! You win!! I can't have sex with ya!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And why not?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because I'm in love with Monica!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're-you're what?!
Monica comes out of the bathroom like a bolt, and Rachel and Joey both enter.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Love her! That's right, I...LOVE...HER!!! I love her!! (They walk together and hug.) I love you, Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I love you too Chandler. (They kiss.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I just-I thought you guys were doing it, I didn't know you were in love!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And hats off to Phoebe. Quite a competitor. (Pause) And might I say your breasts are still showing.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: God! (She turns and buttons up.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right! So that's it! It's over! Everybody knows!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well actually, Ross doesn't.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, and we'd appreciate it if no one told him yet.
Joey suddenly gets very angry.
Ending Credits
Ross's new apartment, he is showing his boss, Dr. Ledbetter his new place and new outlook on life.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: A new place for a new Ross. I'm gonna have you and all the guys from work over once it's y'know, furnished.

lines.speaker: Dr. Ledbetter
lines.text: I must say it's nice to see you back on your feet.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I am that. And that whole rage thing is definitely behind me.

lines.speaker: Dr. Ledbetter
lines.text: I wonder if its time for you to rejoin our team at the museum?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh Donald that-that would be great. I am totally ready to come back to work. I-What? (He notices something through the window.) No! Wh... What are you doing?!! (Dr. Ledbetter is slowly backing away.) GET OFF MY SISTER!!!!!!!!!!!!!
End
